species.description: The King Salmon is a true icon of freshwater fishing.

content.title: Mastery Series: King Salmon at Legendary King Salmon Ground 497
content.description: Mastering the King Salmon in Japan requires more than just luck. It requires an intimate understanding of the underwater topography and the specific bait cycles of Legendary King Salmon Ground 497.

fishing.regulations: Strict catch and release policies are in effect. Barbless hooks only.

editorial.introduction: Mastering the King Salmon in Japan requires more than just luck. It requires an intimate understanding of the underwater topography and the specific bait cycles of Legendary King Salmon Ground 497.

quote.text: Technical proficiency beats raw power every time when it comes to the King Salmon.
quote.author: Capt. Fisherman 497

sections.heading: Reading the Water
sections.body:
Look for the subtle current seams near the volcanic drop-offs. The King Salmon use these as ambush points, waiting for the tide to push baitfish through the channel.

Local experts emphasize that the key to success is staying mobile and checking your drag settings constantly.

sections.heading: Lure Selection and Presentation
sections.body:
Matching the hatch is critical. If the local bait is small, downsize your profile but increase your action. A slow, rhythmic retrieve often yields the best results.

Local experts emphasize that the key to success is staying mobile and checking your drag settings constantly.
